center.name: Hopetoun, Western Australia
center.summary: Hopetoun, Western Australia是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括笑翠鳥，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The present range in Western Australia is southwest of a line joining Geraldton on the west coast and Hopetoun on the south coast. In Tasmania the laughing kookaburra was introduced at several locations beginning in 1906
